item.description: The Pomodoro Technique explained: how it works, why it's effective, the 25/5 rule, common variations, and how to get started with a free online Pomodoro timer.

item.description: Complete comparison of PTFE, PEEK, and PFA tubing: temperature range, chemical resistance, flexibility, and cost. Application selection guide for semiconductor, medical, and chemical industries.

item.description: Learn what makes a strong password: length, entropy, character sets, and common mistakes to avoid. Generate a strong password instantly with our free tool.

item.description: Generate strong, random passwords instantly. Customize length, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols. Runs entirely in your browser — no passwords stored or sent to any server.

item.description: Decode Base64 strings to plain text instantly. Free, client-side Base64 decoder — no data sent to servers. Supports standard and URL-safe Base64. No sign-up required.

item.description: Free online Base64 encoder and decoder. Encode text or files to Base64, decode Base64 strings instantly. Runs in your browser — no data sent to servers. No sign-up required.
